name: Inori's House
short_description: There’s a strange house at the corner of your town, and people from your town have been disappearing. It’s time to figure out the secrets and wonders at Inori’s House.
detailed_description:
School’s done for the day, but everyone seems to have plans to visit the creepy house at the edge of town. Will you join them?

Welcome to Inori’s House, a visual novel containing various branching paths. Choose to side with your friends, or give a loving stranger a chance. How will your story end?

This game contains sexual content and violence. It is not suitable for children.
